series_metadata.series_description: Application to be a school commander, supporting documentation (transcripts, reference letters, etc., depending on requirements, educational/training documents), school commander certificate. Basic training school commander files to include peace officer, private security, corrections, jailer, bailiff, canine evaluator, and adult parole authority and other certification and standards commander programs. Per OAC 109:2, all school commanders must be approved by OPOTA.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 4 years after last school conducted or until documents and/or data saved electronically ; Electronic: 4 years after last school conducted, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
